sample_matches.title: BLOCKS IRON ABSORPTION...BE AWARE!
sample_matches.text_excerpt: Although this WAS one of my favorite products for keeping the immune system up and reducing allergies, it blocks iron absorption. Caffeine and calcium also block iron absorption. If you take this, be sure your FERRITIN levels are very high.
